message:
📖 Add KubeStellar Console guided install to integrations (#1151)

* Add KubeStellar Console guided install to integrations

Add a reference to the KubeStellar Console guided installation
mission in the Integrations section of the README. The guided
install provides pre-flight checks, step-by-step validation,
troubleshooting, and rollback for KitOps installation.

Ref: https://github.com/kitops-ml/kitops/issues/1115
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 📖 docs: reword KubeStellar Console entry as integration, not just install helper

Address Copilot review: frame the bullet as an integration/use-case
with KubeStellar Console rather than just a guided install experience.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -157,6 +157,7 @@ KitOps works with the tools you already use:
 * [KServe](https://kitops.org/docs/integrations/kserve/) - Serve models directly from ModelKits
 * [Kubeflow Pipelines](https://kitops.org/docs/integrations/kubeflow/) - Use ModelKits in ML pipeline steps
 * [ModelPack](https://kitops.org/docs/integrations/modelpack/) - CNCF vendor-neutral packaging format
+* [KubeStellar Console](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kitops) - Use KubeStellar missions to deploy and manage KitOps across clusters (includes guided install with pre-flight checks, validation, and troubleshooting)
 
 See the full [integration list](https://kitops.org/docs/integrations/integrations/).
